title: Peppery Fluffy Indulgent Norwegian Pork Belly Stir-fry
description: This dish features caramelized pork belly slices with a peppery kick and is designed to be indulgent yet diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes (Szechuan Peppercorns)
ingredients.amount: a few flakes, optional for spiciness

instructions: Cut the pork belly into bite-sized pieces. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Fold in the seasoned pork belly slices. Sauté for 5 minutes or until they start to brown slightly on all sides.
Remove from heat and allow to rest while adding red pepper flakes if desired. Reheat gently over low flame just before serving.
Serve hot as a main dish with steamed vegetables or rice.
